_description: Hardcoded architecture and physics constants from the codebase. Not read at runtime — documentation only.

dnn_architecture.input_dim: nagents (flat global state) or GNN_OUTPUT_DIM (if GNN enabled)

algorithm.mixed_precision: torch.cuda.amp.autocast (enabled by use_amp in opt config)

replay_buffer._note: Defined in rl/memory.py, selected in constants.py

action_space.encoding: flat index: action = BS_index * nChannel + channel_index

state_space.content: current channel assignment for each agent (integer channel index)

reward_function.formula: R = profit * (capacity_Mbps / reference) - power_cost * Tx_power_dBm - action_cost * [channel_changed] + negative_cost * [QoS_failed]

target_network_update._note: Soft update applied every nupdate steps (from opt config)

gnn_extension._note: Disabled by default. Defined in constants.py and rl/gnn/

shared_networks.description: If true, all agents share one policy/target network (faster but no per-agent specialization)

linear_increasing.description: Epsilon rises from eps_start toward eps_max linearly, then decays. Original UARA-DRL behavior.

exponential_decay.description: Standard RL decay: eps *= EPS_MAX_DECAY each episode until EPS_MAX_MIN.

action_strategies.epsilon_greedy: Standard e-greedy: random with prob eps, else argmax Q.
action_strategies.langevin: Langevin-noise action selection (stochastic perturbation of Q-values).
